revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 32x32px pixel-art game asset sheet, 1 row x 1 column, one frame only. Solid #FF00FF chroma-key background fills every empty pixel area, no gradients. No alpha transparency; use magenta as the empty background. No grid lines, no cell separator lines, no borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark.

Subject: top-down Japanese satoyama RPG stone bridge abutment field prop tile. The object is a substantial mossy stone foundation that connects a wooden bridge deck edge to a grassy riverbank, making the bridge look physically supported. It should read as a single coherent field object with a clear collision footprint, centered within the 32x32 frame, leaving a clear solid magenta margin to every edge.

Composition: no isometric perspective and no vanishing point. Top-down map readability. The north/top face shows a flat stone cap surface with moss and lichen in greens #4a7a3a and yellow-green #8a9a40. The south/front face shows stacked rough-cut stones with visible mortar joints, brighter along the upper edge and darker toward the grounded base. One side blends into compacted earth with two or three tiny grass tufts. One side visually connects to a cropped wooden bridge plank edge, but keep the whole prop inside the frame. Add a dark grounded contact-shadow band at the bottom using very dark olive #1a2010-looking pixels, integrated into the sprite rather than transparent effects. Add tiny ferns and hanging moss from lower stone joints, attached to the stones only.

Pixel style: crisp low-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixel art, hand-painted, warm cheerful Ghibli-like satoyama feeling without copying any specific franchise. Use hard square pixels only, no antialiasing blur, no painterly softness. Consistent palette, top-left golden-hour light source. Stone palette: #8a857a primary, #b0aa9a lit face, #4a4840 shadow. Use a dark one-pixel outline where useful. Keep scale consistent and legible at 32x32.

Cleanliness: no detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no dust specks, no seam slivers, no leftover effect residue. Every visible pixel belongs to the abutment, attached moss/ferns/grass/earth, bridge plank edge, or grounded shadow. No UI, no characters, no animals, no companion creatures, no logos, no letter emblems, no modern objects, no weapons, no armor, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette. Avoid any resemblance to Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses.
